Also plan.md line 46: 'Locate the comment whose body starts with the marker string `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:` as defined in `shared/description-digest-protocol.md`.' assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 38-58: Describes extracting the description, writing to a temp file, computing the digest via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt', then comparing format tags (both sha256-md) and hex digests side by side. plan.md line 52 also confirms: 'Computed current description digest via `python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt`' followed by format tag and hex digest comparison.

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
